extraction.one_line_summary: PINO won stage 7 mountaintop finish at Malbun after escaping from 19-rider breakaway; HIGITA took yellow by 2 seconds over THOMAS before final TT
tactical_patterns: Israel Premier Tech and Ineos shared pace-making for GC despite having leaders 2nd/3rd, allowing 19-man break substantial gap.
HIGITA attacked within final 2km when leader FULSANG forced to chase, inverting defensive burden before time trial.
THOMAS attacked FULSANG final 500m but FULSANG's team had burned matches controlling earlier, leaving him isolated.

rider_signals.PINO Thibaut: positive: bridged to breakaway riders solo after initially dropped, showing improved climbing form two months after Tour of Alps win
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: probing attack immediately shut down by FULSANG suggests testing legs but no follow-through capacity
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Oscar: positive: finished 2nd on GC stage stealthily without visible attacks, indicating hidden climbing strength within chaos
rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: positive: GC rider held breakaway position deep into final climb before distancing, unusual diesel climbing capacity
rider_signals.FULSANG Jakob: negative: dropped from yellow despite controlling race when THOMAS attacked final 500m, tactical burden cost jersey
